commands.review_summary:
The branch widens the virtual output width passed to Clack note rendering after OpenClaw wraps note text and adds a rendered-output regression test for copy-sensitive session-lock paths.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +28. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main routes session lock paths through note(), and pinned Clack 1.4.0 hard-wraps final note content from getColumns(output) - 6 after OpenClaw's first-pass wrapper. I did not run a live openclaw doctor scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the maintainer-selected automerge path can gate this exact head on checks and mergeability.
